elements.text:
Care and Support Services (CASS) on Call

CASS on Call is a 24/7/365 phone line through the University of Virginia’s Care and Support Services that offers urgent, non-clinical consultation and referrals for students’ safety, well-being, and urgent needs that can’t wait until the next business day. It connects students with appropriate resources for issues like significant illness, urgent mental health concerns, safety resources, emergency housing, or engaging with emergency contacts.
